Event: Cornucopia Island March 2025
Event Date: 19/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A210
Root of Power

Triggers: 3 sec

Grasping Roots
The artifact owner increases damage dealt to 2 nearby enemies by 75% for 5 sec, and all affected enemies become entangled in a spiky vine. For 5 sec, the targets can't move or use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). Exhaustion is also applied to the affected enemies every second while the effect is active. Each second, they take physical damage equal to 125% of the artifact owner's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 15%. The exhaustion lasts for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
